result.stderr:
nfirestore-cli 1.0.5
Copyright (C) 2026 Thomas Nind

  -p, --project     Firestore Project to connect to.

  -d, --Database    Firestore database (leave blank for <default>).

  -l, --limit       (Default: 100) Maximum number of results to return from any
                    query

  -e, --Emulator    Sets FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST environment variable for the
                    application lifetime.

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.
